1.description: get Lillestrøm municipality geometry and kommunenummer

2.description: get parcels (teig) in the municipality by kommunenummer

3.description: get quick-clay polygons (utlosningomr) reduced to municipality extent later with spatial join

4.description: get 1km grid cells (will be reduced to municipality extent)

5.description: find parcels that intersect quick-clay polygons

6.description: assign parcels in quick-clay to 1km grid cells

7.description: count parcels per grid cell (distinct teigid)

8.description: sort grid cells by parcel count descending and id asc tie-breaker
